errors.description: Requested state transition is not permitted by the state machine. Response body includes the current status + permitted targets.
Attempted to publish a lineup with fewer than 1 starter, or with a starter whose enrollment does not match the match's season.
POST /lineup/publish invoked when lineup_published_at IS NOT NULL. Idempotent no-op returns 200 instead of 409 when the payload is identical.
Attempted to schedule / reschedule kickoff_at to a past timestamp. Historical matches must be created via the retrospective-import path.
The result payload does not match the sport's scoring strategy (e.g. providing final_score_home for a time-scored sport). Response body includes the expected shape from ScoringStrategyResolver.
Attempted to mutate a match_results row whose published_at IS NOT NULL. Corrections require an admin-role override + regenerates the standings.
Attempted to add an athlete to the squad whose active AthleteEnrollment does not match the match's season.
Two squad entries proposed the same shirt_number. Squad-shirt uniqueness is enforced per match.
Two squad entries marked is_captain=true. At most one captain per match.
Attempted to log a match_event referencing an athlete who is not in the match's squad.
Multi-team match (team_id IS NULL) requires at least 2 match_participants rows.
Attempted to widen note visibility to `public` without the tenant public-notes entitlement.
Caller lacks the coach / head_coach / admin / owner role required to reach the surface.
Attempted to hard-delete an opponent_logos row while at least one match references it. Null out the references first.
